request.body_raw: {"query":"Find me a vegan pasta recipe for two"}

response.body: {"recipes":[{"title":"Vegan High Protein One-Pot Bolognese","ingredients":["60ml tomato paste","400g canned tomatoes","60g carrots","2 garlic cloves","1 onion (~150g)","1tbsp rosemary","basil","1tbsp thyme","2tsp oregano","250g pasta","60g pea protein mince","1 tbsp liquid smoke","sunflower oil","chilli powder","smoked paprika","paprika powder","garlic powder","salt","black pepper","3ml vegetable broth","soy sauce"],"steps":["Mix all ingredients listed above the pea protein mince and soak the pea protein mince in it (preferably overnight or for 5 minutes in the microwave).","Place the pea protein mince in a pan over medium heat and wait until the remaining liquid has evaporated.","Add some oil to the pea protein mince and fry briefly.","Add the onion and carrot and fry as well.","Finally, add the garlic and stir briefly.","Add the remaining spices and tomato paste and fry briefly.","Deglaze with the broth and chopped tomatoes.","Add the pasta and cook with the lid on until the pasta is soft (add water if needed).","Season with salt and pepper."],"image_url":"https://example.com/b95f0cc2","nutrition":{"calories":1605,"carbohydrates_grams":252,"protein_grams":87,"fat_grams":22},"allergens":["gluten","soybeans"],"portions":{"from":1,"to":2},"kg_token":"kg_08bdeb1c"},{"title":"Lentil Bolognese","ingredients":["400g canned tomatoes","1 onion (~150g)","3 garlic cloves","120g carrots (~1)","2 celery stalks","15ml tomato paste","1g chilli peppers","1 sprig thyme","oregano","250g button mushrooms","400g raw lentils","200g pasta","olive oil","balsamic vinegar","bay leaves","salt","vegetable broth","worcestershire sauce"],"steps":["Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat, then add onions and cook until soft with the lid on.","Add carrots, celery, garlic, and fresh oregano, cover, and cook until caramelized.","Add lentils and all sauce ingredients, then cook on low heat with the lid on for 20-30 minutes until the sauce has reduced and thickened.","Cook pasta and add a ladle of pasta water to the bolognese before serving.","Add pasta to the sauce and serve."],"image_url":"https://example.com/a22dd58e","nutrition":{"calories":1760,"carbohydrates_grams":285,"protein_grams":74,"fat_grams":31},"portions":{"from":1,"to":2},"kg_token":"kg_fa247b82"},{"title":"Roasted Cauliflower Alfredo Pasta","ingredients":["600g cauliflower (~1)","100g garlic","200g arugula","500g spaghetti","3 tbsp nutritional yeast","Nutritional yeast","80ml olive oil","apple vinegar","balsamic vinegar","2 salt","2 black pepper"],"steps":["Chop cauliflower, slice top off garlic bulb, roast both at 200°C for 25 mins with olive oil, salt & pepper.","Cook pasta in salted water.","Squeeze out garlic, blend with roasted cauliflower, nutritional yeast, vinegar, and a splash of water until smooth.","Warm olive oil in a pan, add sauce, a bit of pasta water, stir until bubbling.","Add drained pasta, toss to coat.","Serve with rocket salad on the side, drizzled with balsamic vinegar, olive oil and nutritional yeast. Season with black pepper."],"image_url":"https://example.com/f27362c4","nutrition":{"calories":2831,"carbohydrates_grams":434,"protein_grams":90,"fat_grams":79},"allergens":["gluten"],"portions":{"from":2,"to":3},"kg_token":"kg_1480be0f"}],"short_response":"Sure thing! Here's a vegan pasta recipe for you."}
